verification_source: Manual 2026-06-12 recovery restored the local SnapTrade profile for Broker Position Intake, verified a scheduled-path broker refresh, registered FS Inbox Catch-up as four paired weekday schedules, and added the Positions Sync post-close expected schedule.
notes: The previous generic daily refresh automation and older source-specific local cron jobs are paused and superseded by this receipt-tracked split routine stack.
On 2026-06-12, the temporary usage-conservation pauses were lifted for the current Fundstrat web routines and heavy off-hours routines; only the superseded legacy jobs remain paused.

Broker Position Intake is active again at 8:20 AM ET as the SnapTrade-first read-only account refresh. It promotes positions only after strict validation; failed SnapTrade pulls keep account positions stale/not_checked.

Positions Sync is expected at 4:45 PM ET as a post-close SnapTrade-first read-only wrapper around the existing broker-position refresh. It promotes only after strict validation, reruns orphan triage after successful promotion, and mirrors a one-paragraph Latest Portfolio summary when Notion is available; failed SnapTrade pulls keep account positions stale/not_checked.
Missing connector/source pulls must remain dark/not_checked in the dashboard, never checked clear.
Each scheduled routine should append cloud_routine_receipts.json receipts with run_source=scheduled; manual rehearsal receipts do not prove cloud live-run execution.

UW Opportunity Cache should start by checking live Unusual Whales connector access and updating src/live_source_config.json through live_source_config_update.py with compact proof metadata only, never raw tide rows or premiums.

Each active routine prompt should also include cloud_routine_commit.py safe write-back and missing-source honesty instructions so changed receipt/output files persist without committing unrelated dirty files, and missing source pulls are not treated as checked clear.

Notion schedule reconcile basis: Daily Synthesis should run after the 8:35 AM ET Morning Scan, 9:15-9:30 AM ET is acceptable, UW Opportunity Cache should stay no earlier than roughly 9:45 AM ET, and Full Cockpit Build should run at 10:30 AM ET for buffer.

Early Cockpit Build runs at 8:50 AM ET to publish the earliest useful cockpit after pre-market source intake and Morning Scan. It is intentionally an early build and must leave later Daily Synthesis, UW Opportunity Cache, and Parabolic Cache gaps visible until the 10:30 AM Full Cockpit Build.

Post-Open Evidence Gate runs at 9:40 AM ET to capture same-session UW endpoint proof from the current action runbook. It can promote, downgrade, or keep Today/Reallocation candidates gated; missing, stale, failed, or inconclusive proof must not move candidates to Ready.

Fundstrat Daytime Watch, Post-Open Evidence Gate, and Post-Close Refresh should run src/trigger_check.py. Fired triggers write src/trigger_registry.json / src/trigger_check_summary.json, append a trigger receipt, and send Pushover only as an operator review prompt.

Fundstrat after-hours catch-up, the late-evening web/transcript sweep, and pre-market safety sweep are expected proof targets because Fundstrat timing calls can arrive outside the original 8:10 AM source intake window.

Fundstrat Daytime Watch runs hourly during the market day so urgent/action-changing Fundstrat notes can trigger Pushover. Low-value Fundstrat content remains quiet audit/discovery context and must not become a daily-call row, action prompt, or alert.

FS Inbox Catch-up is registered as four explicit paired schedules (8:20 AM, 12:30 PM, 4:35 PM, 8:45 PM ET) instead of one multi-BYHOUR/BYMINUTE rule, so the automation does not accidentally run a cross-product of times.

On 2026-06-15, readiness proof was scoped to 14 core unattended-readiness routines and 11 support-monitored routines. Support routines stay visible but no longer block core daily operator readiness by themselves.

On 2026-06-15, the Pre-Market Source Intake app automation workspace was corrected from a malformed duplicated path back to the canonical enderverse-held-decisions-strip repo path. The proof activation timestamp was not reset; missed core receipts remain overdue until the scheduler proves them naturally.

Fundstrat Late Evening Web/Transcript Sweep runs at 10:45 PM ET market weekdays to catch late-posted web/video items after the 7:00 PM after-hours pass; transcript text must be written only to the private source vault.
